To make progress, I need to get below the box so I can push it down from (2,7) to (3,7) and later continue routing it downward. The player is at (2,5); the reachable path to get below the box goes left/down through the open lower area, not by oscillating near the box. From (2,5), moving left to (2,4) starts that repositioning and avoids the recent useless left-right shuffle around columns 4–6 by committing to the route around the lower corridor.
